channel.title: The Moral AI Project
channel.description: Theory, experiments, and updates from the Moral AI Project.

item.title: Introducing the Moral Formation Alignment Framework
item.description: The project’s initial framework packages identity, virtues, and moral risk into portable markdown files for agent systems.

item.title: Why Behavioral Constraint Is Not Enough
item.description: Constraint layers can suppress surface behavior while leaving moral reasoning thin, unstable, and easy to reroute.
